form.formComment: Good effort to score just five days ago over 425m at Bendigo by half a length in a Maiden FIN. Strongly fancied and lived right up to expectations last start. Stick with her.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to score just five days ago over 425m at Bendigo by half a length in a Maiden FIN. Strongly fancied and lived right up to expectations last start. Stick with her.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th over 515m at Sandown beaten 5.5 lengths (29.76) behind Repeat The Same in a Special conditions G3 on April 2. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 5th over 515m at Sandown beaten 5.5 lengths (29.76) behind Repeat The Same in a Special conditions G3 on April 2. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by one length at Warragul over 460m (25.93) beating Prince Valhalla in Mix 6/7 on April 3. Makes plenty of appeal on the back of the latest win.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to win by one length at Warragul over 460m (25.93) beating Prince Valhalla in Mix 6/7 on April 3. Makes plenty of appeal on the back of the latest win.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Checked and fell approaching home turn.

form.formComment: Good performance after racing just off the speed to win by 0.7 lengths at Bendigo over 425m (23.73) beating Amron Lucy in R/A FIN on April 5. Likely to struggle this time.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (23.20) when sixth over 400m at this track in a Grade 5. Starts from box 5 for the first time here. Tough line-up and places prospects appear best.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 3.5 lengths at Warrnambool over 450m (25.66) beating Flying Sara in Bottom Up - Maiden on March 30. Hard to envisage a win.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when second (23.52) over 410m at Horsham. Drawn wide. Worth including.

formComments.comment: Good effort last time when second (23.52) over 410m at Horsham. Drawn wide. Worth including.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Bendigo over 425m in 23.82. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fifth over 425m at Bendigo at R/A FIN level. Leading chance on best form.

form.formComment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest at big odds finishing second (22.96) at Warrnambool. Solid top-three prospects.
